full_suite.failure_notes: EXIT 1. Calibration stage rejected intrinsics.source='line_evidence_intersections_15pt_single_view_planar'; ExternalCalibrationRunner accepts only ['metric_15pt_reviewed']. Relabeling automatic line evidence as reviewed would violate provenance and the lane kill rule.

honest_issues: Binary deliverable 2 failed: the pipeline never reached tracking, so this lane does not authorize MOVE-1 attempt #3.

A second fail-closed source allowlist in threed/racketsport/orchestrator.py rejects every honest new external solve method before _court_calibration_needs_correction is evaluated; the manager premise covered only the later gate.

Single-view planar intrinsics remain ill-conditioned: principal point fixed at image center, square pixels assumed, fx=fy 742.9617px, k1=-0.27954, k2=0.19398, inferred camera height 1.3480m, solve median/p95 2.6078/14.5808px.
The three solve correspondences at y=0 are measured ground-net intersections, not top-net height points. Top-net was detected only afterward by the independent evidence validator.
The standalone validator is green and the visual overlay is plausible, but neither is independent CAL accuracy proof; VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
The pb.vision position/orientation comparison assumes its exported units are feet and maps our net-centered axes to its apparent corner-origin frame; it is reference-only, not validation.
next: Kill-rule route to the spine/CAL policy owner: either explicitly add an honest preview source class for line-evidence single-view solves, or collect human-reviewed top-net/net-post height correspondences and produce a legitimately metric_15pt_reviewed artifact. Do not relabel this solve and do not dispatch MOVE-1 attempt #3 from it.
